title: Work in an automotive administration role
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work in an automotive administration role demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Meet automotive administration employment requirements

pcs.text: Structure of automotive industry sector and relevant associations, occupations and job roles are identified1.2 Company business requirements are interpreted and work conditions identified1.3 Company organisational structure, and roles and responsibilities of team members and team leader, are identified1.4 Own work role, personal responsibilities and accountabilities are clarified1.5 Lines of authority and reporting requirements are identified and followed1.6 Company expectations and requirements, including client focus and privacy and confidentiality requirements, are identified and followed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Structure of automotive industry sector and relevant associations, occupations and job roles are identified1.2 Company business requirements are interpreted and work conditions identified1.3 Company organisational structure, and roles and responsibilities of team members and team leader, are identified1.4 Own work role, personal responsibilities and accountabilities are clarified1.5 Lines of authority and reporting requirements are identified and followed1.6 Company expectations and requirements, including client focus and privacy and confidentiality requirements, are identified and followed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Structure of automotive industry sector and relevant associations, occupations and job roles are identified1.2 Company business requirements are interpreted and work conditions identified1.3 Company organisational structure, and roles and responsibilities of team members and team leader, are identified1.4 Own work role, personal responsibilities and accountabilities are clarified1.5 Lines of authority and reporting requirements are identified and followed1.6 Company expectations and requirements, including client focus and privacy and confidentiality requirements, are identified and followed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Meet automotive administration employment requirements

elements.title: Manage daily work activities

pcs.text: Individual tasks are prioritised and completed according to work schedule, company standards, workplace procedures and team expectations, and within required timeframes2.2 Assistance is sought from team leader when difficulties arise in achieving allocated tasks2.3 Changes are made to workload or work priorities as required2.4 Own work is monitored and adjusted according to feedback from supervisors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Individual tasks are prioritised and completed according to work schedule, company standards, workplace procedures and team expectations, and within required timeframes2.2 Assistance is sought from team leader when difficulties arise in achieving allocated tasks2.3 Changes are made to workload or work priorities as required2.4 Own work is monitored and adjusted according to feedback from supervisors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Individual tasks are prioritised and completed according to work schedule, company standards, workplace procedures and team expectations, and within required timeframes2.2 Assistance is sought from team leader when difficulties arise in achieving allocated tasks2.3 Changes are made to workload or work priorities as required2.4 Own work is monitored and adjusted according to feedback from supervisors.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage daily work activities

elements.title: Maintain a safe environment

pcs.text: Safety requirements are identified and followed3.2 Personal work space is kept in a clean, organised and safe condition according to workplace procedures 3.3 Potential hazards and hazardous practices are identified and reported to appropriate persons
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Safety requirements are identified and followed3.2 Personal work space is kept in a clean, organised and safe condition according to workplace procedures 3.3 Potential hazards and hazardous practices are identified and reported to appropriate persons?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safety requirements are identified and followed3.2 Personal work space is kept in a clean, organised and safe condition according to workplace procedures 3.3 Potential hazards and hazardous practices are identified and reported to appropriate persons.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maintain a safe environment

elements.title: Contribute to a productive team environment

pcs.text: Information and instructions relevant to team activities are identified and shared with team members to ensure work goals are met4.2 Individual contributions to team activities are clarified and confirmed with team members4.3 Assistance is provided to team members and constructive feedback is provided and encouraged4.4 Improvements to work activities and variations in the quality of components and work practices are noted and reported to team leader according to workplace procedures4.5 Causes of disharmony and other barriers to achievement are referred to team leader for resolution
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Information and instructions relevant to team activities are identified and shared with team members to ensure work goals are met4.2 Individual contributions to team activities are clarified and confirmed with team members4.3 Assistance is provided to team members and constructive feedback is provided and encouraged4.4 Improvements to work activities and variations in the quality of components and work practices are noted and reported to team leader according to workplace procedures4.5 Causes of disharmony and other barriers to achievement are referred to team leader for resolution?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Information and instructions relevant to team activities are identified and shared with team members to ensure work goals are met4.2 Individual contributions to team activities are clarified and confirmed with team members4.3 Assistance is provided to team members and constructive feedback is provided and encouraged4.4 Improvements to work activities and variations in the quality of components and work practices are noted and reported to team leader according to workplace procedures4.5 Causes of disharmony and other barriers to achievement are referred to team leader for resolution.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Contribute to a productive team environment

elements.title: Identify own development needs

pcs.text: Personal skills are assessed to identify strengths and improvement opportunities, and are matched against job role and company requirements5.2 Personal goals are determined and potential automotive career path options explored and matched against personal goals5.3 Steps are taken, in consultation with team leader or manager, to identify own learning needs for future work requirements5.4 Opportunities to learn and develop required skills and knowledge for future automotive industry work are identified and acted on as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Personal skills are assessed to identify strengths and improvement opportunities, and are matched against job role and company requirements5.2 Personal goals are determined and potential automotive career path options explored and matched against personal goals5.3 Steps are taken, in consultation with team leader or manager, to identify own learning needs for future work requirements5.4 Opportunities to learn and develop required skills and knowledge for future automotive industry work are identified and acted on as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Personal skills are assessed to identify strengths and improvement opportunities, and are matched against job role and company requirements5.2 Personal goals are determined and potential automotive career path options explored and matched against personal goals5.3 Steps are taken, in consultation with team leader or manager, to identify own learning needs for future work requirements5.4 Opportunities to learn and develop required skills and knowledge for future automotive industry work are identified and acted on as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Identify own development needs

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
